subcodes.first_line: Blessed are the souls who, in this Day of God, have attained unto His boundless effusions. Every deed that in this Day [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: طوبی از برای نفوسیکه در یوم الهی بفیوضات نامتناهیه فائز شدند هر عملیکه الیوم
subcodes.subjects: @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @exhortations and counsels
